sourcesContent:
// Dashboard.js import React from 'react'; import './Dashboard.css'; function Dashboard({ dashboardData }) { if (!dashboardData) { return (

📊 Analytics Dashboard

Run an analysis to see results here

📈

No Analysis Data Available

Run an individual analysis or batch processing to view results in the dashboard.

); } const { individualResult, batchResult, timestamp, type, customerData } = dashboardData; const renderIndividualAnalysis = () => { if (!individualResult) return null; const probability = individualResult.probability || 0; const prediction = individualResult.prediction || 0; const riskLevel = probability > 0.7 ? "high" : probability > 0.4 ? "medium" : "low"; const riskColors = { high: "#ef4444", medium: "#f59e0b", low: "#10b981" }; const riskLabels = { high: "HIGH RISK", medium: "MEDIUM RISK", low: "LOW RISK" }; const riskIcons = { high: "🚨", medium: "⚠️", low: "✅" }; return (

🎯 Individual Churn Analysis Result

Analyzed: {timestamp}
{(probability * 100).toFixed(1)}%
{riskIcons[riskLevel]} {riskLabels[riskLevel]}

{prediction ? "High probability of churn" : "Low probability of churn"}

Based on ML model prediction

{individualResult.business_impact && (

💰 Business Impact

₹{individualResult.business_impact.estimated_clv?.toLocaleString() || 0} Estimated CLV
₹{individualResult.business_impact.potential_revenue_loss?.toLocaleString() || 0} Potential Loss
)} {customerData && (

👤 Customer Summary

Tenure {customerData.Tenure} months
Orders {customerData.OrderCount}
Satisfaction {customerData.SatisfactionScore}/5
Cashback ₹{customerData.CashbackAmount}
)}
); }; const renderBatchAnalysis = () => { if (!batchResult) return null; return (

⚡ Batch Processing Results

Processed: {timestamp}
📊
{batchResult.total_records} Total Records
🚨
{batchResult.churn_count} Churn Cases
📈
{(batchResult.churn_rate * 100).toFixed(1)}% Churn Rate
); }; return (

📊 Analytics Dashboard

Comprehensive view of your analysis results

{type === 'individual' ? renderIndividualAnalysis() : renderBatchAnalysis()}
🔍

Run New Analysis

Perform individual customer churn prediction

⚡

Batch Processing

Analyze multiple customers at once

📋

View History

Access previous analysis results

); } export default Dashboard;
